findings.detail: Fan-in layout renders cleanly. All four input lanes (Text, Image, Audio, Video) converge via curved arrows into Modality Encoders, then flow left-to-right through Shared Representation Space → Reasoning Engine → Output Response. No overlapping nodes, no truncated labels, no clipped edges. Color palette consistent (blue inputs, purple auto stages, green done). Concept is immediately legible to an absolute beginner.

Subtitle 'one per input type — converts each to numbers' wraps to three lines, making ENC taller than its right-side neighbours on the same rank. All text is fully visible and the node is not clipped — no content is lost. Soft/cosmetic only; no fix required for pass. Optional: shorten to 'one per type — converts to numbers' to reduce to two lines.

visual_checks.missing_side_panel_pattern: n/a — linear fan-in flow, no side-panel intent
visual_checks.subtitle_illegible: pass — all subtitles at 12px, legible at viewer scale
